title: calamus flexilis
intro: Calamus flexilis, also known as American sweetroot, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the family Zingiberaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, including bloating, gas, and indigestion, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of calamus flexilis include its ability to soothe the nervous system, relieve anxiety and stress, and promote a restful sleep. The herbal preparations of calamus flexilis include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed after consulting with a healthcare professional.
